given: Sentry issue highlight defaults should include transaction context for issue displays

should_find.finding: the default issue highlight field set omits transaction, so issue views using defaults miss the transaction context that should appear by default

notes.body: Regression seed from Sentry fix ba133330286172f02ee83ba5441102a6a10ef218. the default issue highlight field set omits transaction, so issue views using defaults miss the transaction context that should appear by default
